perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand outside a Costco warehouse at night; one is holding a small white dog. They gesture towards the camera. (2) Scene shifts indoors to a living room where one woman presents a bottle of Lysol laundry sanitizer, looking surprised by its weight. She is seen pouring blue liquid into a washing machine tray. (3) The second woman presents a carton of Koh coconut water and a jar of Moccona coffee. She pours the coconut water into a glass, adds coffee, and stirs it with a straw while smiling. (4) Both women sit at a table presenting boxes of Weider Ocular Lutein. They show individual sachets and pour pink powder onto a plate. (5) One woman is seen working at a computer and then reading a book while wearing glasses. (6) The video ends with a montage of the women making heart and glasses gestures against a colorful, festive temple and fireworks background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic female vocals begin immediately with a cheerful tone, accompanied by upbeat, fast-paced background music. (2) Sound effects (SFX) like 'popping' and 'dinging' occur as text overlays appear. (3) The vocals transition between on-screen speech and enthusiastic narration, maintaining a high pitch. (4) Ambient indoor quietness is maintained under the music. (5) The music reaches a crescendo with festive sounds during the final scene.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你們知道嗎？' (Did you know?) - Hook text. (2) '不出門也能買到好市多' (Can buy Costco without going out) - Decorative/Hook text. (3) '好市多網購你曾買什麼？' (What have you bought from Costco online?) - Functional text. (4) 'Lysol 來舒 衣物抗菌液' - Functional product name. (5) 'Koh 純椰子汁', 'Moccona 中烘焙即溶咖啡粉' - Functional product names. (6) '威德適立佳葉黃素' - Functional product name. (7) '全美最多醫師推薦的專利葉黃素' - Decorative/Endorsement text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at storefront -> Three separate product demonstrations -> Usage scenarios -> Festive outro.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair wearing a black beret and white fleece jacket; the other has short dark hair with bangs, wearing a blue beret and yellow puffer jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a parking lot outside Costco; moves to a modern home interior with a couch, bookshelves, and a desk with a computer; ends with a digital festive background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Nighttime outdoor lighting and bright, even indoor home lighting.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Cross-fade and Hard cut synchronized with visual transitions

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item 1 -> Item 2 -> Item 3 -> Conclusion/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional review of Costco online shopping, highlighting specific household and health products (Lysol, Koh coconut water, Moccona coffee, and Weider lutein) to encourage viewers to purchase them through the online platform.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstrations, showing brand names clearly, and listing specific benefits/ingredients.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy duo presentation style with frequent use of variety-show style text overlays and sound effects.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets young adults and families in Taiwan, emphasizing convenience (online shopping) and health (supplements).
